data.content: Implementation complete. Fixed bare printf '->' in scripts/setup.sh:67 and scripts/agent-wizard.sh:51 by using printf '%s' '->' (matching the existing fix in scripts/install.sh). Added regression test scripts-printf-safety.test.ts that scans all scripts/*.sh for bare printf with dash-prefixed arguments. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 2260 tests, build). PR: https://github.com/acartine/foolery/pull/28 on branch fix/foolery-9df0-printf-arrow.
